name: RPlog_All_About_Eva
title: All About Eva
summary: Early one morning at the FLS executive suites in Enterprise Tower, the Jedi Jessalyn Valios and her student Orson Tighe meet with FLS executive Eva Sargent, who agrees to let Jessalyn probe her mind to remove a Sith taint. Relocating to a private conference room at the Plaxton Grand, Orson withdraws at Sargent's request to offer support from afar while Jessalyn gently walks Eva back through her traumatic memories of a dying Jedi, a pursuing Sithling named Cort Stasus, and a mysterious artifact cube. Jessalyn discovers the deeper truth that it was the Emperor Bacharan Valak who actually tampered with Eva's mind, a wound too dangerous to undo without Luke Skywalker's help. Drained, Jessalyn breaks off the session having at least earned Sargent's trust. The three reunite in Plaxton City's Fountain Square, where Orson is found chatting with the swoop dealer Elana Tracer, and after polite small talk the group disperses.
